title: teucrium sieberi var. hirtum
intro: Teucrium sieberi var. hirtum, also known as the Alpine Germander or Wood Germander, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the mint family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are responsible for its health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and improving cognitive function. Teucrium sieberi var. hirtum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine for its potential to soothe digestive issues and alleviate stress.
